acceptance_criteria.statement: The root, manual, generated, and audit branches form one coherent README generation program.
Parent and child README blocks are generated with repo-internal navigation semantics only.
The rollout uses rule explain-target, rule sync-targets, and rule sync-targets --check as the validation path.

evidence_requirements.description: The scope, intended behavior, and acceptance criteria define the shared README generation contract and rollout boundaries.
The rollout documents a workspace-scoped mechanical validation path for README completeness.

expected_properties.statement: All in-scope repositories use one rule-backed README schema for repo roots and first-level child trees.
Parent and child README navigation remains repo-internal and is generated mechanically.
README completeness is enforced by mechanical validation instead of manual review.

fulfillment_summaries.detail: The Summary, Intended Behavior, and Acceptance criteria sections capture the shared README contract and rollout branches explicitly.
The Test Strategy and Assumptions to Prove sections commit the rollout to rule explain-target, sync-targets, and sync-targets --check validation.
